scripts.dev: docker compose up -d db redis && concurrently "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:web" "pnpm run dev:ml"
scripts.dev:api: cd artifacts/api-server && export PORT=5001 && export DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/mediahub" && export RECOMMENDER_URL="http://localhost:8000" && pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:web: cd artifacts/streamflix && export PORT=5173 && export BASE_PATH="/" && export VITE_API_URL="http://localhost:5001" && pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:ml: cd artifacts/recommender-service && source venv/bin/activate && export DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/mediahub" && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
